data.title: Sinch named 2026 Adobe Customer Experience Orchestration Technology Partner of the year
data.description: In a press release from Stockholm on April 21, 2026, Sinch was revealed as the recipient of the prestigious title of the 2026 Adobe Customer Experience Orchestration Technology Partner of the year. This accolade highlights Sinch's ongoing prominence in enabling brands to provide seamless, immediate customer experiences.

data.title: H+H International A/S: Notification to the Polish Competition Authority by Solbet Sp. Z o.o.
data.description: On April 21, 2026, in Copenhagen, Denmark, H+H International A/S received notification that Solbet Sp. Z o.o., a shareholder and key competitor in Poland, has submitted an application to the Polish competition authority seeking permission for acquiring control of a certain entity. H+H is closely monitoring this development which could impact the competitive landscape, considering Solbet's significant presence in the market. This move signifies a potential shift in ownership within the industry.
China’s finance ministry plans to issue 30bn yuan of 91-day bills via auction on April 22.
Airbus says it is boosting sovereign cyber capabilities through the acquisition of French firm Quarkslab.

data.title: Circus Reports Strong Q1 2026 Operational Progress, Accelerates Defence Growth and Expands Product Portfolio
data.description: A global AI-robotics company, Circus SE, recently shared highlights from its Q1 Quarterly Operational Update Call. The company, listed under ISIN: DE000A2YN355 and XETRA: CA1, reported notable achievements in deployments, production scaling, AI advancements, and expansion within the defense sector. They highlighted substantial progress during the first quarter, attributing it to successful deployments and operational data. Circus witnessed significant growth as they shifted from research and development to serial deployment, marking it as their most successful quarter yet.

data.title: Faraday Future Partners with U.S. Education Institution Triple I to Launch the EAI Robotics Summer Camp in the United States, Advancing “Robot & Vehicle + Education” Scenario Deployment
data.description: Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFAI), a California-based global company specializing in Embodied AI (EAI), has revealed a new collaboration. They have partnered with Triple I, an educational institution, to introduce an Embodied AI robotics summer camp in the US. This strategic partnership signifies a major step for Faraday Future's EAI Robotics division and aims to enhance collaboration within the EAI education sector. This initiative marks the first of its kind for FF's EAI Robotics business, showcasing their commitment to educational innovation.
Hamilton Global Opportunities plc (ALHGO.PA) released its 2025 full-year financial results and activity report.
Mizan: Iran executes man over alleged Israel ties and mosque arson during January protests.
UK government: Electricity Generator Levy on excess profits raised to 55% from 45% with immediate effect.

data.title: OCI Global Sells Remaining Shares of Methanex Corporation
data.description: OCI Global, trading on Euronext under the symbol OCI, disclosed the sale of its subsidiary OCI Chemicals B.V.'s 2,612,962 common shares in Methanex Corporation, equating to about 3.4% of the total shares outstanding. The transaction was announced on April 21, 2026 in Amsterdam.

data.title: Stake Partners with ACE & Company to Develop Secondary Transfer Facility for Fractional Real Estate Investments in the UAE
data.description: In an effort to boost liquidity, transparency, and investor trust in Stake’s real estate investments in the UAE, a strategic partnership has been formed between the region's top digital real estate investment platform, Stake, and ACE & Company. The joint venture was announced on April 21, 2026, in Dubai. Stake aims to improve its offerings using ACE & Company’s expertise, with the collaboration expected to drive significant growth in the sector. This move is likely to positively impact Stake’s investment numbers and could increase stakeholder confidence in the region’s real estate market.
Royal Unibrew and PepsiCo will terminate partnership in Northern Europe after current license agreements expire.

data.title: Arbitrum blocks $71M Ether linked to Kelp hack, with assistance from law enforcement, as per council member Griff Green.
data.description: Griff Green, a member of the security council at Arbitrum, stated that the group carefully considered their actions in collaboration with law enforcement and did not make the decision lightly.

data.title: Senator proposes delay of CLARITY Act Senate markup until May, citing need for more input from crypto and banking sectors.
data.description: Senator Thom Tillis of the United States stated that individuals within the cryptocurrency and banking sectors require additional time for their voices to be heard.
BoJ warns that non-bank financial stress could transmit more easily to banking systems in different regions.
